form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th over 530m at Angle Park beaten 11 lengths (31.01) behind Black Noir in a Grade 5 on March 26. Coming out of a very strong form race. Expected to go well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Collided on the first turn; Checked off the heels on the second turn.

form.formComment: Last start finished 4th in a Grade 6 on April 10 over 455m at this track behind City Of Love beaten 3.5 lengths (26.16). This appears within his reach.

form.formComment: Last start winner at this track over 395m running a time of 22.40. Can keep things rolling.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors at big odds last time when third (31.31) at Angle Park, making it two placings on end. Will need a little luck early from the draw. Looks tested in this line-up.

form.formComment: Just been plugging away and needs to improve after being unplaced in four tries. Last start 6th over 395m at this track. Prepared to risk on this occasion.

form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished last over 350m at Murray Bridge Straight beaten 5.5 lengths (19.97) behind Right To Run in a Grade 6 on April 15. Placed two back at this track. Expected to go very well.
